testcase.name: tests.test_fluxpart
testcase.error: tests/test_fluxpart.py:10: in <module> from fluxpart import fvs_partition, fpread fluxpart/__init__.py:2: in <module> from .api import fpread, fvs_partition fluxpart/api.py:3: in <module> from .fluxpart import fvspart, FluxpartResult fluxpart/fluxpart.py:17: in <module> from .wue import water_use_efficiency, WUEError fluxpart/wue.py:6: in <module> from .containers import WUE fluxpart/containers.py:9: in <module> @cattrs.define ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'cattrs' has no attribute 'define'
